sections.paragraph:
fut. יִקְסֹם to divine, to practise divination, as a verb used always of the false prophets of the Hebrews, Deu 18:10, 14 Deu 18:14 2Ki 17:17 Mic 3:6, Mic 3:7, 11 Mic 3:11 Isa 3:2 of evokers of the dead, 1Sa 28:8 and of the prophets of strange nations, as of the Philistines, 1Sa 6:2 of Balaam, Jos 13:22. (To this answers the Syr. ܩܨܰܡ to divine. The primary idea appears to be that of cutting; compare قسم, גָּזַם, a notion which is applied to divination, compare גְּזַר No. 2.)

Derivatives, מִקְסָם and-
